query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `importacoes_v3` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `dataReferencia` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `usuarioId` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `importacoes_v3_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `importacoes_v3_usuarioId_users_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`usuarioId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action
);
command:

  `usuarioId` int NOT NULL,

  CONSTRAINT `importacoes_v3_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `importacoes_v3_usuarioId_users_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`usuarioId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action
